message:
feat(dashboard): add unresponsive VM detection

Add CheckUnresponsive method to AlertChecker that detects VMs that have
stopped reporting metrics. Tracks last metrics time for each task and
returns a critical alert if the VM hasn't reported within the configured
unresponsive time threshold (default 60 seconds).

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
